title: Gleichenia borneensis
intro: Gleichenia borneensis is a species of fern belonging to the family Gleicheniaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Gleichenia borneensis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which have been shown to possess immunomodulatory, hepatoprotective, and anti-cancer activities. In traditional herbal medicine, Gleichenia borneensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs to treat a range of health conditions.
